headline: Piper Sandler starts Take-Two at overweight, sees GTA 6 driving shares to $280
summary: Investing.com -- Piper Sandler has initiated coverage of Take-Two Interactive with an Overweight rating and a $280 price target, arguing that the upcoming launch of Grand Theft Auto VI could become one of the largest entertainment releases in history and drive substantial earnings growth over the next several years.

headline: Piper Sandler Initiates Coverage On Take-Two Interactive with Overweight Rating, Announces Price Target of $280
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst James Callahan   initiates coverage on Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ:TTWO) with a Overweight rating and announces Price Target of $280.
